case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. HANG NGUYEN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, HANG DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-19-2012
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $556.75 AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, HANG
DECLARATION RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, HANG $13,028.77 PRINCIPAL, $424.48 INTEREST, $434.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,887.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, HANG
